attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
  WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
  WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,
  WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  WIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  WIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  WIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
  WIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
  WIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  WIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
  WIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  WIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
  WIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  WIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  WIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
  WIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
  WIRM.EDW_CREATE_USER,
  WIRM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  WIRM.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  WIRM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  WIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
  WIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
  WIRM.GL_DT,
  WIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
  WIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
  WIRM.SPLIT_PCT,
  WIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  WIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
  WIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
  WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
  WIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
  WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,  
  WIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
  ,WIRM.DV_FMV_FLG/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF FMV Q1FY15*/
  /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
  ,WIRM.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT
  ,WIRM.DSV_FLG
  /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
  , WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,                  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
   WIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY       /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,WIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID      /* bbalivad : Added as part of SOT-OA Q1FY17 */
 ,WIRM.XCAT_FLG  /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 ,WIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 ,WIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 ,WIRM.ELA_FLG  /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 ,WIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY  /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP-VIP Proj*/
 ,WIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
,WIRM.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,WIRM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/,
    /* Added below as part of  bridge table logic for SEP REL */
CAST (
TRIM(COALESCE(WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ' THEN TRIM(COALESCE(WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ELSE TRIM(COALESCE(WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) END ||  '~' || 
TRIM(COALESCE(WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ' THEN -9999  ELSE TRIM(COALESCE(WIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)) END AS VARCHAR(70)) 
AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
/*Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19*/
,WIRM.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
,WIRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WIRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of MERAKI Q2FY19*/ 
,WIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,WIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,WIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT
,'=' NET_PRICE_FLG
,'=' CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,-999 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,'UNKNOWN' BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,COALESCE(WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) as DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
  FROM 
  $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE WIRM 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE NIRM
  WHERE WIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
  AND WIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD  
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS'
	AND MDSPD.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD <>'M'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
MDSPD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, 
MDSPD.PROCESS_DT AS PROCESS_DATE,
'POS' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL MDSPD
WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL')
